sourceRef: tip:What to document after every phone call with the VA

slides.headline: Document Your Calls
slides.body: Stay compliant and prepared for audits by logging key details.

slides.headline: Record Name and Date
slides.body: Start with the caller's name and the date and time of the call.

slides.headline: Note Purpose of Call
slides.body: Document the reason for the call, such as 'Verify COE status.'
bullets: Specify if it's about Chapter 33 or other programs

slides.headline: Record Discussion Points
slides.body: Jot down key topics discussed, e.g., 'Confirm enrollment status.'
bullets: List any agreements or decisions made

slides.headline: Document VA Responses
slides.body: Note what the VA representative said, including any forms mentioned.
bullets: Record the name of any forms

slides.headline: Sign Off
slides.body: End with a signature or date to confirm the document is up-to-date.
Learn more about VASCO Assistant Pro for better compliance. Link in bio.
slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Stay compliant and prepared for audits by logging key details after every phone call with the VA. Record the caller's name, the purpose of the call, and any discussion points. Document VA responses and sign off. Future you and your next audit will thank you.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 5 of 5, as it could benefit from a more compelling hook to engage the viewer.
